title: Pinterest Q3 2024 Earnings: 18% Revenue Growth, Record MAUs
text: Pinterest announced financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2024, with Q3 revenue growing 18% year over year to $898 million. Global Monthly Active Users increased 11% year over year to 537 million. GAAP net income was $31 million for Q3, while Adjusted EBITDA was $242 million. On a GAAP basis, the company reported net income of $30.6 million or 4 cents per share compared with a net income of $6.7 million or a penny per share in the year-ago quarter. Non-GAAP net income improved to $275 million or 40 cents per share from $193.3 million or 28 cents per share in the year-ago quarter. CEO Bill Ready commented: We delivered another strong quarter with users reaching another all-time high of 537 million and revenue growth at 18%. Our AI investments are driving results by powering better personalized experiences and greater performance for advertisers, with our lower-funnel ad tools being the fastest-growing part of our business. For Q4 2024, Pinterest expects revenues in the range of $1.125-$1.145 billion, indicating 15-17% year-over-year growth.
